browserSearchPath: CLMS Bio-geophysical Parameters, Vegetation, Vegetation Properties
collectionDescription: Provides information on Leaf Area Index, defined as half the total area of green elements of the canopy per unit horizontal ground area. Every 10-days, estimates are available at global scale, at a spatial resolution of ~300 m. More information here.

layers.longDescription: LAI (Leaf Area Index) is defined as half the total area of green elements of the canopy per unit horizontal ground area. It is expressed in m²/m².

layers.shortDescription: Root Mean Square Error on LAI
layers.longDescription: RMSE is computed between the final dekadal LAI value and the available valid instantaneous values in the compositing window. It is expressed in [m²/m²].

layers.shortDescription: Number of valid instantaneous LAI values
layers.longDescription: Number of available valid instantaneous LAI values in the compositing window.

layers.shortDescription: Length of semi-period before the date
layers.longDescription: Length in days of the semi-period before the dekadal date of the compositing window [days].

layers.shortDescription: Length of semi-period after the date
layers.longDescription: Length in days of the semi-period after the dekadal date of the compositing window [days].
